name: Gladly
description: A customer service platform featuring AI-driven agents that manage omnichannel support conversations and maintain lifelong customer profiles.
notes: Gladly provides a comprehensive REST API for developers and partners to access customer history, conversations, and tasks. High-level API documentation is typically gated behind partner/customer access portals. [human-verified: Enterprise only. Must contact sales. No self-serve signup. OAuth2 not found in docs. Not buildable without partnership agreement.]
